name: gpt-pulse
description: Privacy-minimized Codex lifecycle events for the GPT Pulse macOS companion app.

interface.shortDescription: Read-only Codex task activity for GPT Pulse.
interface.longDescription: Publishes a privacy-minimized lifecycle event journal for the GPT Pulse macOS companion app without modifying Codex task data.
defaultPrompt: Show my Codex desktop task activity in GPT Pulse.
